src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add a commented-out servers block to the OpenAPIDefinition annotation.
Add a Spring Bean to manually define the logout endpoint in the OpenAPI specification.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.after:
@Bean
public OpenAPI customOpenAPI() {
  return new OpenAPI()
      .components(new Components())
      .path(
          "/api/v1/logout",
          new PathItem()
              .post(
                  new Operation()
                      .operationId("logout")
                      .responses(
                          new ApiResponses()
                              .addApiResponse("200", new ApiResponse().description("OK")))
                      .security(List.of(new SecurityRequirement().addList(BEARER_AUTH_NAME)))
                      .tags(List.of("Authentication"))
                      .summary("Logout the current user")
                      .description(
                          """
                          Logout the current user.

                          **Usecase**:
                          - UC_account-dang-xuat

                          """));
}

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Uncomment the entire Redis configuration class to enable Redis integration in the application.
Enable CSRF protection with CookieCsrfTokenRepository instead of disabling it.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: Disabling CSRF is a security risk; the change enables it with a cookie-based token repository, which is a security improvement rather than a JDK compatibility fix.

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Refactor authorization rules to iterate over HTTP methods and use a unified public endpoint inspector method.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: The previous code used separate lists for GET, POST, etc., which is verbose and harder to maintain. The new code uses a stream over HttpMethod values and a single method getPublicSecurityPaths, improving maintainability.

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Update public endpoint registration to use a single method call with varargs instead of multiple add calls.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: The previous code called addPublicEndpoint multiple times; the new code uses a single call with varargs, which is cleaner and likely reflects an API change in ApiEndpointSecurityInspector.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.after: apiEndpointSecurityInspector.addPublicEndpoint("/v1/auth/**", "/actuator/**");
